purpose: Root-level routing files for Loveable to use the existing GitHub image folders as an anatomy/rest-timer knowledge base.
runtimeAlgorithm: Load exercise-map.json, concepts.json, images.json, and rest-facts.json.
Normalize the current exercise name/id to lowercase and match either an exercise-map key or a searchTerms value.
Collect primary conceptIds, then secondary conceptIds.
Find facts whose conceptIds overlap those concepts. Prefer facts with imageIds.
Resolve each image URL from images.json. Use url first; if it fails, try candidateUrls.
During each rest timer show one concise card: title, body, image, and optional source page.
Avoid showing the same fact twice in the same workout if possible.
notes: .nojekyll is included so GitHub Pages will serve folders beginning with underscores if any exist.
The current repo folders should remain where they are. These JSON files are only a routing layer.
